recommendations.title: Visiting Hours
recommendations.overview: A deranged, misogynistic killer assaults a journalist. When he discovers that she survived the attack, he follows her to the hospital to finish her off.

recommendations.title: Red White & Blue
recommendations.overview: A woman attracts the attention of a psychotic former Army interrogator and an emotionally fragile young man caring for his ailing mother.

recommendations.title: LEGO: The Adventures of Clutch Powers
recommendations.overview: Clutch Powers ventures on a mission assigned to him by his boss to solve the chaos that occurred on the Space Police prison planet.

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: Black Butterfly
recommendations.overview: Paul is a down-on-his-luck screenwriter who picks up a drifter and offers him a place to stay. However, when the deranged stranger takes Paul hostage and forces him to write, their unhinged relationship brings buried secrets to light.

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A deaf woman is stalked by a psychotic killer in her secluded home.

recommendations.title: The Cannonball Run
recommendations.overview: A cross-country road race is based on an actual event, the Cannonball Baker Sea to Shining Sea Memorial Trophy Dash, organized by Brock Yates to protest the 55 mph speed limit then in effect in the U.S. The Cannonball was named for Erwin G. "Cannonba

recommendations.title: Baby Blues
recommendations.overview: On a secluded family farm, a mother suffers a psychotic break due to postpartum depression, forcing the eldest son to protect his sibling from the mother they have always known and loved.

recommendations.title: Shark Bait
recommendations.overview: After losing everything, a young fish, Pi, goes to live with his family on the Reef. There he meets the love of his life but finds that she already has the unwanted affections of a bully shark. He must follow his destiny to save her and rid the Reef
recommendations.director: Kyung Ho Lee, Howard E. Baker, John Fox

recommendations.title: Mojave
recommendations.overview: A suicidal artist goes into the desert, where he finds his doppelgänger, a homicidal drifter.
